title: diasperus ramillosus
side_effects: Diasperus ramillosus can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Ingestion of the plant can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and stomach pain. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can cause liver damage and increase the risk of bleeding in sensitive individuals. Furthermore, improper use of Diasperus ramillosus can interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions such as diabetes and blood pressure disorders.
